title: FARMER STEVEN / BELGIUM
subtitle: GET INSPIRED! A ROADMAP TO REPLICATE KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ABOUT FAIR FOOD SUPPLY CHAINS
description: A guide showcasing how Farmer Steven in Belgium leveraged second-hand vending machines and regional partnerships to enhance direct farm-to-consumer food supply chains. It presents a replicability roadmap for sustainable cooperation, social customer experiences, and risk-controlled business diversification.
